def fib4(n: int):
    """The n-th element of the Fib4 number sequence can be computed iteratively. The sequence is analogous to Fibonacci with base values fib4(0)=0, fib4(1)=0, fib4(2)=2, fib4(3)=0. The recurrence relation is fib4(n) = fib4(n-1) + fib4(n-2) + fib4(n-3) + fib4(n-4) for n > 3. Implement this without recursion for efficiency.
    >>> fib4(5)
    4
    >>> fib4(6)
    8
    >>> fib4(7)
    14
    """
